data.content: I can see the express delivery test expects `15.00` but the method returns `10.00`, so that test will fail. Let me start `dotnet watch test` for you — it will re-run tests automatically whenever you save a file.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to use `dotnet watch test` for hot reload. This is an MSTest project targeting .NET 8.0. Let me start `dotnet watch test` in async mode so the user can see the tests run and iterate.

Let me first run the tests once to see which ones fail, then set up the watch.
